ValidationRule.description: Project has an Invoice and/or an ILV in Status Draft.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( ValCountHasInvoiceDraft__c =1, ValCountHasILVDraft__c =1 ), OR( ISCHANGED(ProjectPartner__c), ISCHANGED(ContractPartner__c), ISCHANGED(InvoiceReceiver__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectCostCenter__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectStatus__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectSubType__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectRateHour__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectCurrency__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Project is locked due to an Invoice or ILV in Status "Draft". Please complete Invoice first.(PR011)
